title: OpenAI is spending $30 billion on a new mega 3.2 GW data center in Georgia — and it's trying really hard to quell local opposition
summary: OpenAI says it has already been gathering feedback from state and local officials, community leaders, schools, and other regional partners “to learn about local priorities and gather feedback on the project.” To that end, OpenAI is holding a public open house on…
